mechanism_summary: AFLFast FAST schedule multiplies energy by n_fuzz log2, damping frequently-hit (saturated) hash-lookup paths to ~0.4x, starving structured DTD seeds of mutation budget; minimizer's calibrated energy is frequency-agnostic and avoids this starvation.
one_line: AFLFast n_fuzz damping starves saturated hash-lookup path seeds

mechanism_summary: AFLFast FAST n_fuzz rarity damping throttles already-exercised attribute-validation buckets, depleting mutation budget before any seed reaches val!=0; minimizer's intrinsic-calibration-only energy avoids this throttling.
one_line: AFLFast n_fuzz damping depletes budget before val!=0 is reached
